description_long: This is a large, stately house set on a spacious, landscaped lot with numerous mature trees scattered throughout the property. The house features a complex, multi-gabled dark roof with several dormers and a prominent central turret, giving it a grand and somewhat Victorian appearance. The exterior walls are primarily brick, with large windows and multiple protruding sections, including bay windows and a rounded front entry. A wide driveway leads to a side garage, and there is a curved, covered front porch supported by columns. The property is bordered by a low fence, and there are additional architectural details such as chimneys and decorative trim. The overall impression is of a luxurious, historic-style residence with significant attention to detail and curb appeal.
description: A grand, multi-story brick house with a complex gabled roof, turret, and extensive landscaping, featuring a prominent entry porch and side garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a rounded porch, central turret, and the majority of the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, driveway, and the house's extended wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the curved driveway area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the turret, side yard, and more of the property's trees and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay windows and dormers
attribute_entryway_design: Rounded covered porch with columns, central turret, and decorative trim
